patches.title: Immediate Pivot on Empty
patches.trigger: The agent arrives at a container or surface expected to hold the target object, but the observation reveals it is empty or contains only unrelated objects.
action_flow: acknowledge the container is empty or irrelevant
do not re-examine or interact further with that container
select the next most plausible container or surface from the mental map or systematic order
navigate directly to that new location
avoid: repeatedly examining the same empty container
wasting steps on objects inside that are not the target
patches.principle: The agent arrives at a container or surface expected to hold the target object, but the observation reveals it is empty or contains only unrelated objects.. Steps: acknowledge the container is empty or irrelevant; do not re-examine or interact further with that container; select the next most plausible container or surface from the mental map or systematic order; navigate directly to that new location
patches.when_to_apply: The agent arrives at a container or surface expected to hold the target object, but the observation reveals it is empty or contains only unrelated objects.

patches.title: Ignore Non-Target Objects
patches.trigger: While searching for a specific target object, the agent encounters other objects that are not the target and not required for any state-change operation (e.g., not ingredients for heating, cooling, cleaning).
action_flow: do not pick up, examine, or move any non-target object
do not open containers that are not likely to hold the target
continue searching only for the target object(s)
if a container contains only non-target objects, close it and move on
avoid: examining objects that are not the target or tools
patches.principle: While searching for a specific target object, the agent encounters other objects that are not the target and not required for any state-change operation (e.g., not ingredients for heating, cooling, cleaning).. Steps: do not pick up, examine, or move any non-target object; do not open containers that are not likely to hold the target; continue searching only for the target object(s); if a container contains only non-target objects, close it and move on
patches.when_to_apply: While searching for a specific target object, the agent encounters other objects that are not the target and not required for any state-change operation (e.g., not ingredients for heating, cooling, cleaning).

patches.title: Collect Multiples Then Place
patches.trigger: The task requires placing multiple identical objects into a single target receptacle (e.g., 'put two vase in coffeetable', 'find two laptop and put them in desk').
action_flow: locate and acquire the first target object
do not place it immediately; continue searching for the remaining target objects
keep the acquired objects in inventory (if possible) or set them aside near the destination
after all required objects are acquired, navigate to the target receptacle
place all objects one by one into the receptacle
avoid: placing the first object immediately and then having to travel back to find more
losing track of the count of acquired objects
mixing up target objects with non-target items in inventory
patches.principle: The task requires placing multiple identical objects into a single target receptacle (e.g., 'put two vase in coffeetable', 'find two laptop and put them in desk').. Steps: locate and acquire the first target object; do not place it immediately; continue searching for the remaining target objects; keep the acquired objects in inventory (if possible) or set them aside near the destination; after all required objects are acquired, navigate to the target receptacle; place all objects one by one into the receptacle
patches.when_to_apply: The task requires placing multiple identical objects into a single target receptacle (e.g., 'put two vase in coffeetable', 'find two laptop and put them in desk').
